projectDescription: Shipfox is a continuous shipping platform for engineering teams — define YAML workflows in your repo, run shell and AI agent steps on your own runners, and trigger pipelines from GitHub, Sentry, and other tools you already use.
keyFeatures: YAML-based workflow definitions versioned in your repository under .shipfox/workflows/
AI agent steps (model + prompt) as first-class workflow citizens
Run and shell steps side-by-side with agent steps in the same job
Gate blocks with CEL expressions to retry, restart, or fail steps conditionally
Trigger from GitHub push, Sentry issues, schedules, or manual (on-demand) fire
Self-host or managed — runners execute on your own infrastructure
30+ supported AI model providers including Anthropic, OpenAI, DeepSeek, Google, and more
Dashboard with live streaming run, job, and step logs
Multi-job DAG pipelines with `needs` ordering and isolated job environments
AI-ingestible docs with llms.txt, skills package, and copy/paste authoring prompt
publicApiSurface: workflowDocumentSchema — Zod schema for workflow YAML validation
parseWorkflowDocument() — parse and validate a workflow document
InvalidWorkflowDocumentError — typed error with Zod validation issues
npx skills add shipfox/agent-skills — install AI authoring skill
